# JournalingSuggestion.Workout.Details

**Structure**

Information about a workout that a person completes.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Details
```

## Overview

Each [doc://com.apple.JournalingSuggestions/documentation/JournalingSuggestions/JournalingSuggestion/Workout] contains an instance of this structure with its [doc://com.apple.JournalingSuggestions/documentation/JournalingSuggestions/JournalingSuggestion/Workout/details-swift.property] property.

## Instance Properties

- **activeEnergyBurned**: The energy that a person burns during the workout.
- **activityType**: The type of workout.
- **averageHeartRate**: The average heart rate that a person experiences during the workout.
- **date**: The range of time in which the workout takes place.
- **distance**: The distance that the workout spans.
- **localizedName**: Localized name of workout, like “Indoor Pickleball”.

## Inspecting workout details

- **details**: A structure that contains the workout specifics.

## Conforms To

- JournalingSuggestionAsset
